selfcheck.chosen_text: Solo drafts/.eml en sandbox y aprobación humana
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: map of S22 — «Ningún correo real se envía: solo archivos .eml o drafts en sandbox»; human approval mandatory before any send action (course still does not send).

selfcheck.chosen_text: Solo evidencia débil de contacto a revisar; no prueba de fraude
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «resolución y verificación» + disclaimer demos — fuzzy match is evidencia de contacto, not legal identity or fraud. High similarity ≠ fraud/parentesco/auto-send.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Solo los scopes mínimos (p. ej. draft) necesarios
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «OAuth/service account y scopes» — least privilege: only draft/read scopes needed, never mail.full if compose/draft suffice. Demo denies mail.full/send.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Reutilizar el mismo draft_id si la key existe
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «idempotencia, audit log…» — if key already exists, return previous draft id; do not create another message on retry.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
